ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "racegrp" TEXT /* Racial group of the patient */,
  "homeless" TEXT /* Housing status of the patient (housed or homeless) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID or policy number */,
  "date_entered" TEXT /* Date the patient entered the treatment program */,
  "date_exited" TEXT /* Date the patient exited the treatment program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the patient (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment program (inpatient, outpatient, etc.) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in weeks */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment program */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment program */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for patient eligibility */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the program */,
  "insurance_coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the program is covered by insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving treatment */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (active, completed, etc.) */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (medication, therapy, etc.) */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment plan */,
  "prescribed_by" TEXT /* Name of the medical professional who prescribed the treatment */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Detailed treatment plan */,
  "next_appointment" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES treatment_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "substance_use" (
  "substance_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance use record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "substance" TEXT /* Type of substance used */,
  "any_sub" TEXT /* Any substance use in the past month (yes/no) */,
  "cesd" INTEGER /* CESD score (a measure of depression) */,
  "drug_risk" INTEGER /* Drug risk score */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of substance use (daily, weekly, etc.) */,
  "last_use" TEXT /* Date of last substance use */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of substance used */,
  "method_of_use" TEXT /* Method of substance use (injection, smoking, etc.) */,
  "reason_for_use" TEXT /* Reason for substance use (recreational, self-medication, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_use_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_substance_use_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recovery_metrics" (
  "recovery_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery metric record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "mcs" REAL /* MCS score (a measure of mental health) */,
  "pcs" REAL /* PCS score (a measure of physical health) */,
  "pss_fr" REAL /* PSS-FR score (a measure of stress) */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were measured */,
  "mcs_change" REAL /* Change in MCS score from the previous measurement */,
  "pcs_change" REAL /* Change in PCS score from the previous measurement */,
  "pss_fr_change" REAL /* Change in PSS-FR score from the previous measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recovery metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recovery_metrics_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment program */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the patient attended the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (group therapy, individual therapy, etc.) */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES treatment_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counselors" (
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counselor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the counselor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the counselor */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the counselor was hired */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (substance abuse, mental health, etc.) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Professional certifications */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the counselor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the counselor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the counselor (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counselor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counselor_patients" (
  "counselor_patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each counselor-patient relationship */,
  "counselor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the counselor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the counselor started working with the patient */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the counselor stopped working with the patient */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("counselor_patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counselor_patients_counselor_id FOREIGN KEY ("counselor_id") REFERENCES counselors ("counselor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counselor_patients_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrative user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrative user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrative user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrative user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (active, inactive, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrative user */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (view, edit, etc.) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (PC, mobile, etc.) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_admin_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_user_id") REFERENCES admin_users ("admin_user_id")
)
